rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the cards keep circling back to purpose / calling, with a right path emphasis. The sequence begins in Past with Stars (16), so big-picture alignment and long-range clarity is already in play. Stars colors your calling through guidance, long-range direction, and the larger pattern that only becomes visible once reactive noise starts to quiet. At the pivot, Present places Moon (32) at the center, making this the point where the reading can shift. Moon often points to emotional weather, recognition, changing cycles, and what rises or falls with perception in your calling. Looking ahead, Future with Dog (18) points toward trusted support and the steadiness it brings, if the middle-card lesson is handled with care. Dog often points to steady support, loyal alliance. Stars (16) with Dog (18) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of guidance and loyalty, asking you to convert vision into steps while staying alert to assuming loyalty without reciprocity. The spread turns on Moon (32) more than any other card. Moon often points to emotional weather, recognition, changing cycles, and what rises or falls with perception in your calling. Stars (16) with Dog (18) keep emphasizing a blend of guidance and loyalty, asking you to convert vision into steps while staying alert to assuming loyalty without reciprocity.
